market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Experience unparalleled elegance at this fully-featured 4-guest residence offering modern comforts for discerning travelers. Located in one of the city's most desirable areas, this premium accommodation features [insert specific detail here] to ensure memorable stays. With our attentive service and commitment to quality, guests can expect [insert specific experience here]. Book now to secure your dates at the exclusive rate of £517 per night. [Add 1-2 more concrete features based on the property's unique characteristics.]
analysis.photo_order_rec: The primary photo should showcase the most distinctive feature (likely exterior architecture or main living area) to immediately communicate luxury positioning. This visual anchor is critical at this price point.
key_diagnosis: Nightly rate of £517 is 195% above the cohort median of £175 while occupancy (15.2%) is 46% below median performance (28.3%)
Title 'Elysian Residence' exceeds 50 characters and lacks specific value propositions (43/50 characters used)
Zero host reviews despite 11 guest reviews, suggesting listing presentation inconsistencies
analysis.outreach_hook: Your listing is priced 195% above the market median yet occupancy remains 46% below cohort benchmarks - this price-performance divergence offers clear ROI potential
